popup_prompt_placeholder: Describe the task (what's wrong, what to do)…
popup_screenshot_alt: Captured screenshot of the current tab
popup_no_config: Configure Shepherd Capture before filing a task.
popup_needs_host: Access to {baseUrl} was revoked. Grant it again to file captures there.
popup_cant_capture: This page can't be captured (browser or store page).
err_origin: Shepherd rejected the request origin. Add this extension's ID to SHEPHERD_ALLOWED_HOSTS.
err_auth: Authentication failed. Check the Shepherd token in settings.
err_too_large: The screenshot is too large to upload.
options_baseurl_hint: Use http://localhost:7330 for a local core, or your https://<host>.ts.net Tailscale URL — saving a remote URL asks the browser to allow access.
options_host_unsupported: Unsupported host. Use http://localhost:7330 or an https://<host>.ts.net Tailscale URL.
options_host_denied: Access denied — Shepherd can't be reached at that host until you allow it. Save again to retry.
popup_signals_locked: Enable console & network capture in settings.
popup_recorder_reload: Recording is on, but this tab was open before it started — reload the tab to capture console & network here.
popup_a11y_failed: Couldn't run the accessibility audit on this page.
options_signals_a11y_label: Run an accessibility (axe-core) audit on capture
options_recorder_label: Record console errors & failed network requests
options_recorder_allsites_note: Recording reads console output and network failures on every site you visit, including full request URLs (query strings may contain tokens), and forwards them to Shepherd in the task. Enable only while you need it; turn it off to revoke the all-sites permission.
